name: Pomelli AI
description: On-brand multi-format ad creatives—static, video, and HTML5—optimized for major social and display networks.

name: Midjourney
description: Text-to-image AI known for painterly, high-quality art—describe a scene in words and iterate with upscales, remixes, and variations.

name: DALL·E
description: OpenAI's text-to-image model—describe a scene and get polished visuals fast, with editing and variations inside ChatGPT and other apps.

name: RunwayML
description: Browser-based AI for text-to-video, smart editing, backgrounds, and image generation—built for creators who want pro-ish results without a pro toolchain.

name: Cursor
description: AI-native code editor (VS Code–based): chat with your repo, inline edits from natural language, and strong completions across languages.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: Inline AI pair programmer for VS Code and other editors—completions, whole functions from comments, and Copilot Chat for explanations and fixes.

name: AutoGPT
description: Open-source autonomous agent loop: set a high-level goal, and it plans steps, executes, and revises—often backed by LLM APIs for research and drafts.

name: AgentGPT
description: Browser-based autonomous agents: set a named goal, and it breaks work into steps—great for research, plans, and drafts without local installs.

name: Google Gemini
description: Google's multimodal AI assistant—chat, write, research, and get coding help, with deep integration across Docs, Gmail, and the wider Google ecosystem.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that answers questions directly with cited sources—real-time web results, no ads, and conversational follow-ups built in.

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's flagship AI assistant—write, code, research, and brainstorm through conversation, with image understanding, voice mode, and a vast ecosystem of custom GPTs.

name: Jasper AI
description: AI writing platform built for marketing teams—generate on-brand blog posts, ad copy, and campaigns with Brand Voice, 50+ templates, and optional SEO integration.

name: Copy.ai
description: AI copywriting tool for marketers and sales teams—90+ templates, multi-step Workflows, and a generous free tier for product descriptions, emails, and social captions.

name: ElevenLabs
description: AI voice platform with best-in-class realism—text to speech, voice cloning from short samples, AI dubbing, and 29+ languages for creators, developers, and publishers.

name: Murf AI
description: Professional AI voiceover studio—200+ lifelike voices, per-sentence customisation, built-in media sync, and team collaboration for e-learning and video content.

name: Otter.ai
description: AI meeting assistant that transcribes conversations in real time, identifies speakers, and auto-generates summaries and action items for Zoom, Meet, and Teams.

name: Replit AI
description: AI coding assistant built into Replit's browser IDE—Ghostwriter completions, inline chat, and an Agent that builds full apps from plain-English descriptions with zero setup.

name: AdCreative.ai
description: AI ad creative generator trained on real campaign data—produce batch banner and social creatives with predicted conversion scores to prioritise what to test first.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant built for nuanced analysis and long documents—200K token context window, exceptional writing quality, and a safety-first design that acknowledges uncertainty.
